stories.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
stories.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

stories.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
stories.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.

stories.title: Fast-tracking genetic leads to reverse cellular aging
stories.summary: Biologists use Co-Scientist to find novel factors that successfully rejuvenate human cells.

stories.summary: We’re expanding access to Google AI Ultra subscribers globally and introducing a new capability powered by Street View.

stories.title: Robots Could Turn E-Waste Into a Source of Legacy Chips
stories.summary: Electronic waste is moving up on regulatory agendas in 2026. stories.title: Inside Verobotics’ edge AI robotics deployment at NVIDIA’s Israel campus
stories.summary: Verobotics said its robot turns vertical surfaces from risky, one-off access zones into repeatable, data-rich robotic workspaces. The post Inside Verobotics’ edge AI robotics deployment at NVIDIA’s Israel campus appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Rovex and Sphaira pioneer autonomous patient transport
stories.summary: Patient mobility in hospital settings is ripe for automation, with Rovex and Sphaira among the innovators taking different approaches. The post Rovex and Sphaira pioneer autonomous patient transport appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
stories.summary: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. stories.title: AGI Is Not Multimodal
